parameters.query:
WITH
  params AS (
    SELECT
      NULLIF($1, '') AS lead_id_str,
      NULLIF($2, '') AS preview_url
  ),
  -- Only accept a plausible Lovable URL to avoid garbage being posted in.
  valid AS (
    SELECT
      p.lead_id_str,
      p.preview_url,
      p.lead_id_str IS NOT NULL AND p.preview_url IS NOT NULL
        AND p.preview_url ~ '^https://[^/ ]+\.lovable\.app(/|$)'     AS ok_lovable,
      p.lead_id_str IS NOT NULL AND p.preview_url IS NOT NULL
        AND p.preview_url ~ '^https?://'                             AS ok_any_url
    FROM params p
  ),
  updated AS (
    UPDATE bridge.website_projects wp
    SET preview_url = v.preview_url,
        build_method = 'lovable',
        deployment_status = 'live_lovable',
        updated_at = NOW()
    FROM valid v
    WHERE v.ok_lovable
      AND wp.lead_id = (v.lead_id_str)::uuid
    RETURNING wp.website_project_id, wp.slug, wp.preview_url, wp.lead_id
  ),
  lead_info AS (
    SELECT l.lead_id, l.business_name, l.city
    FROM bridge.leads l
    JOIN updated u ON u.lead_id = l.lead_id
  )
SELECT jsonb_build_object(
  'ok',           (SELECT ok_lovable FROM valid),
  'ok_any_url',   (SELECT ok_any_url FROM valid),
  'lead_id_str',  (SELECT lead_id_str FROM valid),
  'preview_url',  (SELECT preview_url FROM valid),
  'updated',      COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                    'website_project_id', website_project_id,
                    'slug', slug,
                    'preview_url', preview_url,
                    'lead_id', lead_id
                  ) FROM updated LIMIT 1), NULL),
  'lead',         (SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                    'business_name', business_name,
                    'city', city
                  ) FROM lead_info LIMIT 1)
) AS result;

WITH p AS (SELECT $1::jsonb AS d)
INSERT INTO bridge.workflow_events
  (lead_id, workflow_name, event_type, old_status, new_status, details_json)
SELECT
  (d->>'lead_id')::uuid, 'website', 'lovable_swap',
  'static_template', 'lovable',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'new_preview_url', d->>'preview_url',
    'slug',            d->>'slug'
  )
FROM p
WHERE d->>'lead_id' IS NOT NULL AND d->>'lead_id' <> ''
RETURNING event_id;

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "chat_id": {{$env.BRIDGE_ADMIN_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}}, "text": "{{ $('Validate + swap').first().json.result.ok ? '\u2705  Lovable preview swapped in for ' + $('Validate + swap').first().json.result.lead.business_name + '\\n\\n  New preview: ' + $('Validate + swap').first().json.result.updated.preview_url + '\\n  Marketing will use this URL.\\n\u2014 Web Team' : '\u26a0\ufe0f  Lovable swap failed \u2014 preview_url did not look like a Lovable URL.\\n  Expected: https://*.lovable.app/\\n  Got: ' + ($('Validate + swap').first().json.result.preview_url || '(empty)') + '\\n\u2014 Web Team' }}" }

parameters.responseBody:
={{ $('Validate + swap').first().json.result.ok ? '

✅ Lovable preview swapped

Business: ' + ($('Validate + swap').first().json.result.lead?.business_name || 'lead') + '

New preview URL stored: ' + $('Validate + swap').first().json.result.updated.preview_url + '

The Marketing workflow will now use this URL when it sends outreach.

— Bridge Digital Solution

' : '

⚠️ Swap failed

The preview_url did not look like a Lovable URL.

Expected pattern: https://*.lovable.app/

Got: ' + ($('Validate + swap').first().json.result.preview_url || '(empty)') + '

Double-check the URL you pasted and try again.

' }}
